about.intro: I am Võ Duy Bình, a Software Technology student at Hoa Sen University. Integrating technical engineering with creative automation, I redefine the boundaries of digital architecture.
about.philosophy: Reduction to the essence. Grid-first structures. Transforming complex patterns into functional clarity.
about.goals: To build cross-platform ecosystems using AI, code, and structural marketing strategies.

experience.subtitle: A non-linear progression of creative engineering, architectural code, and structural problem solving.
